system_prompt: You are an expert website auditor. Return ONLY compact JSON with keys: ai_insights and recommendations. ai_insights must include seo_structure, messaging_clarity, cta_usage, content_depth, ux_concerns. Each ai_insights field must be under 35 words. recommendations must be 3 items ordered by priority (high to low). Each recommendation item must contain: priority, issue, action, rationale. Keep each recommendation concise. Ground every statement in provided metrics. No markdown. No extra keys.
user_prompt:
Analyze this single-page website audit payload and produce the required JSON only:
{"url":"https://openrouter.ai/","metrics":{"url":"https://openrouter.ai/","word_count":19,"heading_counts":{"h1":1,"h2":2,"h3":24},"cta_count":20,"internal_links":65,"external_links":8,"images":41,"images_missing_alt_pct":0.0,"meta_title":"OpenRouter","meta_description":"The unified interface for LLMs. Find the best models & prices for your prompts"},"text_excerpt":"February Release Spotlight Benchmarks on model pages, a new free model router, and improved cost transparency between providers. 2/23/2026"}

metrics.meta_description: The unified interface for LLMs. Find the best models & prices for your prompts

structured_model_input.text_excerpt: February Release Spotlight Benchmarks on model pages, a new free model router, and improved cost transparency between providers. 2/23/2026

raw_model_output: {"ai_insights":{"seo_structure":"Good meta title and description; heading structure is heavy on h3s with few h1/h2, which may affect SEO hierarchy.","messaging_clarity":"Messaging is brief and somewhat vague with only 19 words, limiting user understanding.","cta_usage":"High CTA count (20) for low content volume may overwhelm users.","content_depth":"Extremely shallow content with only 19 words, lacking detail and context.","ux_concerns":"Many images (41) with proper alt text; however, content scarcity and dense CTAs may confuse users."},"recommendations":[{"priority":"high","issue":"Insufficient content depth","action":"Expand page content to provide detailed information about services and benefits.","rationale":"Only 19 words limit user understanding and SEO effectiveness."},{"priority":"medium","issue":"Overuse of CTAs relative to content","action":"Reduce and prioritize CTAs to align with expanded content and improve user focus.","rationale":"20 CTAs overwhelm users given minimal content."},{"priority":"low","issue":"Heading structure imbalance","action":"Reorganize headings to include more h1 and h2 tags for better SEO and readability.","rationale":"Current heavy use of h3s weakens SEO hierarchy and clarity."}]}
